Brown feather star

Kingdom Animalia

Updated Sep 2019

Where seen?

This brown feather star is sometimes seen near living reefs on Pulau Hantu.

Features

12-15cm in diameter. With more than 20 arms. The cirri on the underside is banded. Included on this page are animals that are mostly brown as well as banded brown or orange.

Pulau Hantu, May 19 Photo shared by Loh Kok Sheng on facebook .
Pulau Hantu, Jun 08
Cirri on the underside used to cling onto things.

**Species are difficult to positively identify without close examination.

On this website, they are grouped by large external features for convenience of display.*

Brown feather stars on Singapore shores

On wildsingapore flickr

  • Photos for free download
  • Map of sightings in Singapore
